ORDER RE: DISMISSAL. NO APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 12/7/2021 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 68153.

NO APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF. THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF JORGE REDONDO IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT MARIA CHOCOJ IS PRESENT. ASSISTED BY MARGO SEELY, CERTIFIED SPANISH INTERPRETER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
REMARK:FILE DESTROYED PURSUANT TO THE ORDER SIGNED ON 12/07/2021 BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG.
